creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2008-01-12 16:30:57 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    multimedia           Makefile 
  Added files:
    multimedia/subtitlecomposer Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
                                pkg-plist 
    multimedia/subtitlecomposer/files 
                                      patch-src__core__subtitleline.cpp 
  Log:
  Subtitle Composer supports the basic operations (text, time, and
  style edition) as well as real time preview, spell checking and
  more; aiming to become an improved version of Subtitle Workshop for
  UNIX-like OSes.
  
  WWW:    http://www.kde-apps.org/content/show.php?content=69822
  
  PR:             ports/119456
  Submitted by:   Max Brazhnikov <makc at issp.ac.ru>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.250     +1 -0      ports/multimedia/Makefile
  1.1       +28 -0     ports/multimedia/subtitlecomposer/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/multimedia/subtitlecomposer/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +11 -0     ports/multimedia/subtitlecomposer/files/patch-src__core__subtitleline.cpp (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/multimedia/subtitlecomposer/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +27 -0     ports/multimedia/subtitlecomposer/pkg-plist (new)
